RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0007 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: CityDrive VIN: VIN94224AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Nissan Model 3 base 1 20,517 20,517 2 Destination fee 1 1,377 1,377 3 Options package 1 2,583 2,583 4 Doc fee 1 125 125 5 Tax 1 2,544 2,544 Total: $27,146
